query_title: When the Last Sword Is Drawn

recommendations.title: Samurai I: Musashi Miyamoto
recommendations.overview: Struggling to elevate himself from his low caste in 17th century Japan, Miyamoto trains to become a mighty samurai warrior.

recommendations.title: A Taxi Driver
recommendations.overview: May, 1980. Man-seob is a taxi driver in Seoul who lives from hand to mouth, raising his young daughter alone. One day, he hears that there is a foreigner who will pay big money for a drive down to Gwangju city. Not knowing that he’s a German journali

recommendations.title: Viking
recommendations.overview: The early Middle Ages. A time of heavy swords and dark blood law. The ruling clan is in discord. The guilt for the accidental death of the brother has fallen on the Grand Duke. According to the law, revenge must be taken by the younger brother, a bas

recommendations.title: Pride
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a group of LGBT activists decide to raise money to support the National Union of Mineworkers during their lengthy strike. There is only one problem: the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.

recommendations.title: Trouble at Timpetill
recommendations.overview: The children of a small European mountain village end up being its only residents, soon after the adults cannot take their behavior any longer.

recommendations.title: The Lost Viking
recommendations.overview: A young Viking called Vitharr arrives in Britain with dreams of conquest and adventure, but when his family and clan are ambushed and killed, he must survive alone in this strange,dangerous new land as he searches for his Uncle's settlement.

recommendations.title: Gold
recommendations.overview: Spanish soldiers battle indigenous tribes and their own brutal natures as they search for a legendary city built of gold.

recommendations.title: Shogun Assassin
recommendations.overview: A Shogun who grew paranoid as he became senile sent his ninjas to kill his samurai. They failed but did kill the samurai’s wife. The samurai swore to avenge the death of his wife and roams the countryside with his toddler son in search of vengeance.

recommendations.title: Deidra & Laney Rob a Train
recommendations.overview: After their mother ends up in jail, two sisters turn to train robbery in order to support their family.

recommendations.title: Osama
recommendations.overview: After the rise of the Taliban in Afghanistan and the restriction of women in public life, a preteen girl is forced to masquerade as a boy in order to find work to support her mother and grandmother.
